Layout - MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions

 SAS Name
 Variable Name

 BENE_ID 
 Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID 

 BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 
 Reference Year (MBSF) 

 ALZH 
 Alzheimer's Disease End-of-Year Indicator 

 ALZH_EVER 
 Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the Alzheimer’s disease indicator 

 AMI 
 Acute Myocardial Infarction End-of-Year Indicator 

 AMI_EVER 
 Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the AMI indicator 

 ANEMIA 
 Anemia End-of-Year Indicator
